articles.title: Is Russia ‘simulating diplomacy’ because of war losses in Ukraine?
articles.summary: Putin has talked about a truce, but some analysts say it's a ploy to buy time while Moscow's soldiers are on back foot.

articles.title: San Diego mosque shooting: Who were the victims?
articles.summary: Authorities say victims Amin Abdullah, Mansour Kaziha and Nader Awad played a role in responding to the attackers.

articles.title: At least 87 Gaza aid flotilla activists abducted by Israel on hunger strike
articles.summary: The protest comes after Israeli forces intercepted the last remaining vessel sailing towards the besieged Gaza Strip.

articles.title: Putin hails ‘unshakable foundations’ in meeting with China’s Xi
articles.summary: China’s Xi Jinping has welcomed Russian President Vladimir Putin to Beijing.

articles.title: Chinese supertankers exit Hormuz as Trump, Vance talk up Iran deal
articles.summary: Oil prices ease amid the latest comments from the White House, but experts warn they will stay high even after any deal.

articles.title: Iran war day 82: Tehran warns of ‘new fronts’ as Trump sets deadline
articles.summary: Iran says it learned from past clashes as Trump gives Tehran 'two to three days' to reach a deal.

articles.title: Foreign fishing vessels empty Mauritanian waters
articles.summary: Who is benefiting from the fishing agreements between Mauritania's government and foreign vessels?

articles.title: Taiwan’s president says future will not be decided by ‘external forces’
articles.summary: President Lai says Taiwan's future is up to its people as the island faces Chinese and US headwinds.

articles.title: Bangladesh beat Pakistan by 78 runs to clinch historic Test series win
articles.summary: Taijul Islam's six-for helps Bangladesh bowl out the visitors for 328 in their first home series win over Pakistan.

articles.title: UN cuts global growth forecast, blaming Middle East crisis
articles.summary: UN economists forecast global GDP to grow 2.5 percent in 2026 and 2.8 percent in 2027.

articles.title: ‘Cockroach Janta Party’: Top Indian judge’s comment sparks satire, protest
articles.summary: Controversial remark by Supreme Court chief justice triggers a political movement, with thousands of Gen Z signing in.

articles.title: Knicks rally from 22 points down to stun Cavs in overtime
articles.summary: Jalen Brunson scores 38 points as the New York Knicks beat the Cleveland Cavaliers 115-104 in Game One.

articles.title: Jones, Jackson move to Republican primary run-off in Georgia governor race
articles.summary: Burt Jones and Rick Jackson will face each other again in the June 16 run-off.

articles.title: Daughter honours security guard father killed while protecting mosque
articles.summary: The daughter of mosque security guard Amin Abdullah is remembering him as the “absolute best dad in the world.”

articles.title: Fear grips eastern DR Congo amid deadly Ebola outbreak
articles.summary: From Bukavu to Kinshasa, concern is spreading among residents and street vendors as Ebola cases rise.

articles.title: Arsenal fans erupt after team secures Premier League crown
articles.summary: Arsenal has won the Premier League, ending a 22-year drought.

articles.title: China’s Xi Jinping, Russian President Vladimir Putin hold talks in Beijing
articles.summary: Xi and Putin hold talks just days after US President Donald Trump made an official visit to China.

articles.title: Republican Thomas Massie who stood up to Trump defeated in Kentucky primary
articles.summary: With an estimated 72 percent of the vote counted, Ed Gallrein led with 54.4 percent to Massie’s 45.6 percent.

articles.title: Bodies of Italian divers recovered from cave in Maldives
articles.summary: The bodies of two of five Italian divers who died in a deep underwater cave in the Maldives have been recovered.

articles.title: Nigeria says joint US strikes kill 175 ISIL fighters in country’s northeast
articles.summary: Nigerian Army lauds joint US operation as part of ongoing military campaign to 'hunt down and kill terrorists anywhere'.

articles.title: US President Trump, family granted immunity from pending tax audits
articles.summary: Democratic lawmakers blast move, which follows the establishment of a controversial 'Anti-Weaponization Fund'.

articles.summary: US Vice President JD Vance says the US is prepared to take military action if Iran does not agree to a nuclear deal

articles.title: US Senate advances resolution to curb Trump’s power to wage war on Iran
articles.summary: Vote to advance War Powers Resolution seen as rare rebuke of the president as pressure grows to end US attack on Iran.

articles.summary: Warning comes after Trump threatened military action against Iran and gave it 'two to three days' to strike a deal.

articles.title: Putin meets Xi: Why Russia and China need each other
articles.summary: Vladimir Putin’s arrival was announced just a day after United States President Donald Trump left Beijing.
